mapper.select: SELECT a.attribute_id attributeId FROM driving_course_attribute a JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id JOIN driving_course_record r ON r.content_id=c.content_id WHERE c.content_id=#{contentId} and r.user_id=#{userId}
select COUNT(r.user_id) finished from driving_attribute_userid r WHERE r.user_id=#{userId}

SELECT distinct a.attribute_id attributeId FROM driving_course_attribute a JOIN driving_lable l ON a.attribute_id=l.attribute_id JOIN driving_content c ON l.lable_id=c.lable_id JOIN driving_course_record r ON r.content_id=c.content_id WHERE l.lable_id=#{lableId} and r.user_id=#{userId}
